tasks.name: Schedule time-based Phase 2 scenarios
tasks.description: Add _schedule_web_breaks(), _schedule_dryer_drifts(), _schedule_ink_excursions(), _schedule_registration_drifts(), _schedule_cold_starts() methods. Call from _generate_timeline(). Follow existing _schedule_unplanned_stops() pattern.

tasks.name: Schedule condition-triggered Phase 2 scenarios
tasks.description: Add _schedule_coder_depletions() and _schedule_material_splices() methods. CoderDepletion: one instance per ~24h of sim time at evenly-spaced start times. MaterialSplice: one instance per ~3h of sim time. Call from _generate_timeline().

tasks.name: Signal name validation test
tasks.description: Test that every signal ID in _AFFECTED_SIGNALS matches a valid key in the store after engine init. Catches the DryerDrift naming bug class permanently.

tasks.name: Auto-scheduling integration test
tasks.description: Test that ScenarioEngine with default config and sim_duration_s=7*86400 produces instances of all 10 scenario types. Verify sorted by start_time and reasonable count.

tasks.name: Update acceptance test procedure
tasks.description: Update Scenario Evidence section with specific Phase 2 scenario expectations for Medium and Full tiers.

tasks.name: Update docstrings and create progress file
tasks.description: Update module docstring and _generate_timeline() docstring. Create plans/phase-2.1-progress.md.
